title: sibliths rideable phantoms
description: Use two enderpearls and a clock to summon a giant rideable phantom!
body:
A small project allowing players to craft a "nighthawk" its a summoning tool that can be used to summon a large phantom that can be ridden.

You right click with your "nighthawk" to summon and mount it and off you go, you dont have to worry about a pen for the creature beacuse as soon as you dismount it blips into the aether! (only to be later recalled by you with your nighthawk)

[https://youtu.be/wAAbU1BDtGQ](https://youtu.be/wAAbU1BDtGQ)
